metadata.description: Revizto plugin marketplace — live project intelligence and curated Revizto platform skills over the Revizto MCP Server.

plugins.name: revizto-project-intelligence
plugins.description: Live, read-only project intelligence over the Revizto MCP Server — a six-view Cowork dashboard plus the curated Revizto platform skills. Discovers the installing user's own licence and project at runtime; headline totals are exact, sampled detail is always labelled.
